page.title: Recover in Style: Book a Marbella Yacht Charter for Ironman 2027

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella Ironman yacht charter 2027 for post-race recovery. Relax on a luxury boat from Puerto Banús with crew, drinks & snacks included.
data.summary: Celebrate your Ironman achievement with a Marbella yacht charter in 2027. Our fleet departs from Puerto Banús and includes skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks for post-race recovery.
key_facts: Charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella
Fleet includes Astondoa 40 (9 pax) and Mangusta 80 (12 pax)
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and IVA
Complimentary drinks: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
Mangusta 80 from €4,719/4h with free jet ski
Book via WhatsApp for other yachts and custom durations

faq.q: What is included in a Marbella Ironman yacht charter 2027?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring yourself and your post-race appetite.

faq.q: Which yachts are best for post-Ironman recovery?
faq.a: For small groups, the Astondoa 40 (9 pax) or Azimut 39 (11 pax) are great value. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (12 pax) offers space and a free jet ski. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: How much does an Ironman yacht charter cost in Marbella?
faq.a: Tier A boats like the Astondoa 40 start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. The Mangusta 80 costs €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a jet ski. Other boats are priced on request.

faq.q: Can I charter a yacht for just a few hours after the race?
faq.a: Yes, most boats offer 2-hour, 4-hour, 6-hour, or 8-hour charters. Short trips are ideal for a quick celebratory cruise along the Marbella coast.

faq.q: Do I need to bring my own food and drinks?
faq.a: No, all charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You are welcome to bring extra food or drinks if you wish.

faq.q: Where do the yachts depart from?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. It is easily accessible by taxi or car, and parking is available nearby.

faq.q: Can I book a yacht for a large group of Ironman supporters?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Mangusta 80 (12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (12 pax), and Ferretti 94 (12 pax) are ideal for larger groups. Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing.

faq.q: What is the best time of day to charter after Ironman?
faq.a: Afternoon charters are popular, as the sea is calm and the sun is warm. A 4-hour trip from 14:00 to 18:00 allows time to relax, swim, and toast your finish.

data.body_html:
Finishing an Ironman is one of the toughest achievements in sport. After months of training, a brutal swim, a 180 km bike leg, and a full marathon, you deserve more than a finisher's medal — you deserve a proper celebration. A Marbella Ironman yacht charter 2027 offers the perfect way to recover in style on the Mediterranean. With our fleet departing from Puerto Banús, you can kick back with cold drinks, light snacks, and a dedicated crew while the Costa del Sol glides past.

Why choose a yacht charter after Ironman Marbella?

The 2027 Ironman Marbella course takes athletes along the coast from Puerto Banús to Estepona and back. After crossing the finish line on the Golden Mile, your muscles need rest, your mind needs calm, and your friends need a place to toast your success. A private yacht provides all of that — no crowds, no noise, just the sound of the sea and the pop of a cava cork. Our charters include a licensed skipper, so you can truly switch off.

Our fleet for post-race recovery

We offer a range of boats to suit different group sizes and budgets. All depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina. Here are the most popular choices for Ironman celebrations:

  • Astondoa 40 — 12.5 m, up to 9 passengers. From €749 for 2 hours to €2,299 for 8 hours. Ideal for small groups.
  • Azimut 39 — 12.5 m, up to 11 passengers. Same pricing as the Astondoa 40. A sleek Italian option.
  • Mangusta 80 — 24 m, up to 12 passengers. From €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours, includes a free jet ski. Perfect for larger parties.
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge — 17.6 m, 12 passengers. Pricing on request via WhatsApp.
  • Ferretti 94 — 29 m, 12 passengers. The ultimate luxury option. Contact us for a quote.

All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA. No hidden extras.

What’s included in your charter

Every booking comes with a full package so you can relax from the moment you step aboard:

  • Licensed, experienced skipper
  • Fuel for the entire trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks (olives, crisps, nuts, etc.)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) included in the price

You are welcome to bring your own food or drinks if you prefer. Just let us know in advance.

Suggested itinerary: Puerto Banús to Cabopino

A classic post-Ironman route is a 4-hour cruise from Puerto Banús east to Cabopino. You'll pass the sand dunes of Artola, anchor in a calm cove for a swim, and enjoy lunch on board. The return leg offers views of La Concha mountain and the Marbella skyline. For a longer trip, head west to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés near Estepona. Our skipper will tailor the route to your preferences.

How to book your Marbella Ironman yacht charter 2027

Booking is simple. Visit our boat rental Marbella page to browse the full fleet, then contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing on any boat not listed with fixed rates. We recommend booking at least 2–3 months in advance for Ironman weekend, as yachts fill up quickly. Let us know your preferred date, group size, and any special requests — we'll handle the rest.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a Marbella Ironman yacht charter 2027?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring yourself and your post-race appetite.

Which yachts are best for post-Ironman recovery?

For small groups, the Astondoa 40 (9 pax) or Azimut 39 (11 pax) are great value. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (12 pax) offers space and a free jet ski. All depart from Puerto Banús.

How much does an Ironman yacht charter cost in Marbella?

Tier A boats like the Astondoa 40 start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. The Mangusta 80 costs €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a jet ski. Other boats are priced on request.

Can I charter a yacht for just a few hours after the race?

Yes, most boats offer 2-hour, 4-hour, 6-hour, or 8-hour charters. Short trips are ideal for a quick celebratory cruise along the Marbella coast.

Do I need to bring my own food and drinks?

No, all charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You are welcome to bring extra food or drinks if you wish.

Where do the yachts depart from?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. It is easily accessible by taxi or car, and parking is available nearby.

Can I book a yacht for a large group of Ironman supporters?

Absolutely. The Mangusta 80 (12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (12 pax), and Ferretti 94 (12 pax) are ideal for larger groups. Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing.

What is the best time of day to charter after Ironman?

Afternoon charters are popular, as the sea is calm and the sun is warm. A 4-hour trip from 14:00 to 18:00 allows time to relax, swim, and toast your finish.

Ready to celebrate your Ironman finish in style? Browse our full fleet and book your Marbella yacht charter for 2027 today. The Mediterranean is waiting.
